title: Me & the Beasts
overview: When the alternative rock band Los Pijamistas agrees to play at Suena Caracas 2016, a propaganda festival organized by the Nicolás Maduro regime, the patience of guitarist and singer Andrés Bravo reaches a limit. He leaves the band and starts his solo project from scratch. The severe symptoms of the crisis and an alienated environment will break his armor. However, he will not be alone: The Beasts, two masked and mysterious beings, will accompany him along the way.

trailers.title: ME & THE BEASTS Trailer | PÖFF 2021
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
